MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.

Phil Kilduff, Esq. special appearance for and with Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, not present.
Defendant: Alba Rosa Tellechea, present in pro per.
Parties have settled, terms not read into the record.
Matter is placed on CRC-225 Dismissal calendar for June 20, 2006 at 10 A.M. in Dept. 212.
